section_1_version_progression._section: VERSION HISTORY — All versions from last push to current state

versions_since_last_push.label: FIXED POINT
versions_since_last_push.summary: CIP lock hunt (30/30 confidence), noise squeeze, DADC-DADI-ADAC chain verified. PLL discovery: σ²_A parabola maps onto phase-locked loop architecture. Mathematical addenda for all discoveries.

versions_since_last_push.label: PROGRAMME COMPLETE
versions_since_last_push.summary: Full sweep of all 75 systems (EXP-10), final four untouched systems (EXP-11), gravity deep study with GW150914/GW170817 (EXP-12). Master inventory 100%. 93% universal entropy bound extended to gravitational waves.

versions_since_last_push.label: CIP RESTORE POINT
versions_since_last_push.summary: 'Pipeline Lock List' retired. Replaced by Compositional Integrity Protocol (CIP). PLL now means Phase-Locked Loop only. HCDT (Higgins Compositional Diagnostic Toolkit) named as umbrella. 16 formal academic citations injected into all 21 experiments. 48 terminology replacements across 29 files.

versions_since_last_push.label: CHATGPT REVIEW INTEGRATION
versions_since_last_push.summary: ChatGPT (GPT-5.2 Thinking) independent review integrated. Discipline framing (CCD). Three-tier claim system. Bell test normalization fixed (10.09% violation, 12.31% configuration). Vertex theorem promoted L4→L5. Presentation outline finalized.

versions_since_last_push.label: F17 FULL TEST LADDER
versions_since_last_push.summary: F17 Hessian-derived diagnostic expanded from 7 to 22 domains. b>0 confirmed 17/22 (77%). CoDa zero-handling doctrine confirmed by nuclear SEMF. All 4 long series (N≥100) pass all universals.

versions_since_last_push.label: F17 FULL CHAIN v3.0
versions_since_last_push.summary: F17 tested across 44 domains from ALL HUF experiments (EXP-01 through EXP-12). 38 real + 5 physics + 1 prescribed. Long series 19/19 a≤0.

versions_since_last_push.label: NATURE'S CONFIRMATION SERIES
versions_since_last_push.summary: 23 nuclear/quantum systems catalogued (NS-01→NS-23). 22/23 (96%) confirm CoDa/HUF across 41 orders of magnitude. Universal 93% entropy bound. Evidence tiers: 4 flagship, 5 strong, 3 exploratory.

versions_since_last_push.label: SIMPLEX PARABOLA HUNTER
versions_since_last_push.summary: EXP-13 tests every D=3 system for parabolic trajectories on the 2-simplex. 7/10 (70%) show statistically significant ILR parabolas (F>4); 3/10 are perfect ILR geodesics. New diagnostics: ILR Curvature Index, Cartesian Parabola Theorem.

versions_since_last_push.label: THE CALIBRATION PROOF
versions_since_last_push.summary: Display calibration parameters for ternary diagrams PROVEN to equal Aitchison geometric quantities — 7 formal theorems with machine-precision (10⁻¹⁵) verification. Calibration Septuple (θ, σ, λ, t*, α, K, φ) formalized. Real Ember electricity data validates universality. Aitchison-Cartesian Distortion Tensor quantified (10–80× distortion; GW150914 curvature sign reversal). Bell test S=2.2018 reinterpreted as Aitchison-Cartesian gap.

section_5_science_verification._section: SCIENCE INTEGRITY CHECKS — Key claims to verify against known physics

checkpoints.claim: Calibration Septuple (θ, σ, λ, t*, α, K, φ) equals Aitchison geometric quantities
checkpoints.evidence: 7 formal theorems with machine-precision (10⁻¹⁵) numerical verification
checkpoints.verify: Check that each theorem maps a display parameter to an Aitchison quantity. Verify the numerical precision claim. This is the headline v4.0 result.

checkpoints.evidence: GW150914 curvature sign reversal: K_ILR = -8.88 vs K_Cart = +1.00
checkpoints.verify: Check that the curvature computation uses correct ILR transform. The sign reversal is the key finding — Cartesian display shows convex where Aitchison geometry shows concave.

checkpoints.claim: Bell test S=2.2018 reinterpreted as Aitchison-Cartesian gap
checkpoints.evidence: CHSH assumes Euclidean independence, but compositional closure guarantees correlations. Proposed resolution: reformulate S using Aitchison independence (ILR covariance = 0).
checkpoints.verify: Check the mathematical argument. This is classified as SPECULATIVE in CLAIM_CLASSIFICATION (contamination risk HIGH). Verify the classification reflects appropriate caution.

checkpoints.claim: F17 diagnostic: b > 0 in 17/22 domains confirms stochastic contamination detection
checkpoints.evidence: 22 real-data domains tested. 5 exceptions are boundary/transitional energy countries.
checkpoints.verify: Check that the quadratic fit σ²_A(t) = at² + bt + c is correctly formulated. Verify b > 0 interpretation (stochastic layer detectable).

checkpoints.claim: 93% universal entropy bound holds across all domains including gravitational waves
checkpoints.evidence: Proton (0.928), spin (0.969), GW phase (0.923). All below 93%.
checkpoints.verify: Check H/H_max computation for each domain. Verify the 93% threshold is not cherry-picked.

checkpoints.claim: NS-01 SEMF analysis: Valley of stability visible as σ²_A minimum, shell model magic numbers in F17 residuals
checkpoints.evidence: Z = 2, 8, 20, 28, 50, 82 appear as local features. Vol/Coul variation = 5.92 is dominant pair.
checkpoints.verify: Cross-check against known nuclear physics. The valley of stability IS at Z ≈ 26 (Fe). Magic numbers ARE 2, 8, 20, 28, 50, 82, 126.

section_8_hfpa_naming._section: HIGGINS FIXED POINT ANALYSIS — NEW METHOD NAME (2026-04-20)
section_8_hfpa_naming._note: Added after the main briefing was drafted. This is a naming/hierarchy change, not a science change.
section_8_hfpa_naming.what_changed: Peter Higgins named the overarching analytical method 'Higgins Fixed Point Analysis' (HFPA).

cip_rule_5_rename.old: No new constants (6.02 dB budget, 115 Hz·m, 5.5-octave BW locked from BTL)
cip_rule_5_rename.new: The Fixed-Point Rule — No free constants; every parameter must be traceable to a prior physical measurement or an exact mathematical identity.
cip_rule_5_rename.rationale: 6.02 dB is the founding anchor constant from BTL loudspeaker engineering. But the rule is bigger than one number — it's the universal principle that anchor constants come from measurement, never from fitting. Each domain has its own anchor constants (AME2020 for nuclear, STAR/ALICE for QGP, etc.).

why_the_name_works: EITT finds entropy that is FIXED (invariant) under geometric-mean decimation
The vertex of σ²_A is a FIXED POINT (stationary point) of the compositional stress
Anchor constants are FIXED — traceable to measurement, never tuned
The method fundamentally identifies what doesn't move under transformation
Resonates with existing EITT_Fixed_Point_Proofs.pdf in the repo
files_updated: ai-refresh/HUF_COMPLETE_REFERENCE.json — HFPA acronym entry, CIP rules array

section_9_higgins_tagging_convention.title: Higgins Tagging Convention — Provenance Markers
section_9_higgins_tagging_convention.what_changed: Every tool, method, theorem, diagnostic, protocol, or principle that originated inside HUF now carries the 'Higgins' prefix as a provenance marker.

classification.Higgins_Tool: Originated inside HUF — carries 'Higgins' prefix (EITT, CIP, F17, Vertex Theorem, 93% Bound, Calibration Septuple, etc.)
classification.CoDa_Tool: Standard CoDa community tools — NOT tagged (CLR, ILR, ALR, Aitchison geometry)
classification.Standard_Mathematics: Established math — NOT tagged (Shannon entropy, chain rule, simplex)
classification.External_Physics: Physics community concepts — NOT tagged (SEMF, QGP, LIGO, CKM, PMNS)
classification.RWA_Engineering: Rogue Wave Audio engineering DNA — tagged RWA, not Higgins (DADC, DADI, ADAC)

section_9_higgins_tagging_convention.rationale: Prevent confusion between HUF-derived methods and standard techniques. Associate all HUF components to a tagged name so practitioners know the boundaries. And so they know who to invite for lunch.
files_updated: HUF_COMPLETE_REFERENCE.json → v1.3 (provenance fields on all entries)
section_9_higgins_tagging_convention.action_for_chatgpt: When referencing HUF tools, use the Higgins prefix on first mention. Maintain distinction from CoDa community tools which do NOT carry the Higgins tag.

section_10_higgins_diffraction_compositi.action: NEW PRINCIPLE — Higgins Diffraction Composition Principle (HDCP)
section_10_higgins_diffraction_compositi.summary: Diffraction is nature's fixed-point composition. Every diffracting wave partitions its energy into a composition [T, R, D, A] on the simplex. Ratios determined by geometry (λ/a), invariant under amplitude scaling. Founding case: DADC baffle step 6.02 dB.
section_10_higgins_diffraction_compositi.babinet_note: Babinet's Principle (1837) is compositional closure — predates Aitchison (1982) by 145 years

section_11_hfsp_exp14.summary: Higgins Fixed-Point Selection Principle: the diagnostic anchor comes from the data, not from the analyst. Tested on AME2020 nuclear data with 6 anchors. Ne-20 discovered as structural attractor (F17 R²=0.935, b>0). Fe-56 is energetic attractor (Lyapunov V_min=0, r=1.0000). Systems theory maps HUF-GOV to observer, σ²_A to Lyapunov function.
section_11_hfsp_exp14.hierarchy: CCD → HFPA → HFSP → HDCP → EITT → CIP
section_11_hfsp_exp14.ne20_discovery: Different diagnostics need different anchors: F17 uses Ne-20 (structural), Lyapunov uses Fe-56 (energetic). Both are 'natural' — both from physics.

section_12_hfsp_master_catalog.title: HFSP Master Catalog — 75 Systems Classified
section_12_hfsp_master_catalog.summary: All 75 HUF systems classified into 7 fixed-point categories with domain-native anchors identified for each. The catalog is the mandatory first step before CIP processing.

categories.ENERGETIC: 27 systems — minimum energy / maximum binding (Fe-56, ignition points, stellar burning)
categories.CONSERVED: 12 systems — exact conservation laws (CKM, PMNS, Higgs, GW budgets)
categories.EQUILIBRIUM: 12 systems — thermodynamic/market equilibrium (energy markets, atmospheres, ecology)
categories.STRUCTURAL: 8 systems — geometric/crystallographic constraints (rocks, shell model, exotic hadrons)
categories.TRANSITION: 8 systems — phase transitions / critical points (QGP, energy transitions, freeze-out)
categories.SCALING: 6 systems — RG flow / power-law evolution (QCD coupling, DGLAP, cosmic rays)

section_12_hfsp_master_catalog.status: 1/75 tested with native anchor. 74 remain. 7 open questions for investigation.
